topStories.description: Donald Trump’s announcement of a two-week ceasefire paves the way for negotiations on Iran's 10-point plan.

topStories.title: Video: Employee Starts Massive Fire At California Toilet Paper Warehouse
topStories.description: Chamel Abdulkarim, 29, was initially reported as missing and was "later suspected to have started the fire in the warehouse", officials said.

topStories.title: Veteran Congress leader Mohsina Kidwai passes away at 94
topStories.description: She was suffering from age-related ailments, her son-in-law Razi Ur Rehman Kidwai said

topStories.title: Rupee Surges 50 Paise Against US Dollar In Early Trade After US, Iran Truce
topStories.description: The rupee rises 50 paise to 92.56 after US suspends military strikes against Iran for two weeks.

topStories.title: ‘Golden age for middle east’: Trump celebrates ceasefire, vows US support in Hormuz buildup
topStories.description: A two-week ceasefire was established shortly before Trump's deadline to attack Iran. Trump claimed a complete victory and acknowledged Iran's 10-point proposal for negotiations. While Iran said that enemy suffered crishing defeat

topStories.description: Iranian state media also said the 10-point plan for securing an end to the war would require Washington to accept its uranium enrichment program – a previous red line for the Trump administration

topStories.title: Is Lebanon part of US-Iran ceasefire? The Netanyahu vs Sharif fault line, explained
topStories.description: A ceasefire that was supposed to bring clarity has instead produced an immediate and pointed disagreement between two of its key players — with Pakistan insisting Lebanon is covered and Israel insisting it is not.

topStories.title: How Pakistan helped secure a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran
topStories.description: Pakistan has a historic relationship with Iran, but an agreement was far from certain, writes the BBC’s Caroline Davies

topStories.title: Caution, relief as US politicians respond to Trump’s ceasefire with Iran
topStories.description: Democrats welcome the truce and call for accountability, as Republican hawks voice scepticism about talks with Tehran.

topStories.description: Iranians have commemorated the victims of the US strike on a girls school in Minab, that killed 168 people.

topStories.description: Countries urge full commitment to two-week ceasefire, praise Pakistan for role in facilitating truce.

dailyNews.title: Silver rockets Rs 13,500/kg, gold gains Rs 3,700/10 gms as Iran war ceasefire lifts inflation worries. Right time to buy?
dailyNews.description: Gold and silver prices surged on Wednesday, mirroring global gains as U.S. President Trump's ceasefire with Iran eased inflation fears. MCX silver futures jumped 6%, while gold futures rose 2.4%. International spot gold hit a near three-week high. Experts advise caution amidst volatility, suggesting buying opportunities above key levels.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan turns Cillian Murphy: Peaky Blinders memes galore as US-Iran agree to ceasefire
dailyNews.description: US and Iran have agreed to a two-week ceasefire, including reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Ahead of the negotiations in Pakistan's Islamabad, netizens shared several memes on social media.

dailyNews.title: LPG cylinder price on 8 April: Domestic and commercial gas rates in Mumbai, Bengaluru, Delhi, Kolkata today
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump, on Tuesday night, announced that US has agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran proposed by Pakistan. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi confirmed Tehran's acceptance

dailyNews.title: Congress flags fuel crisis in Karnataka, hits at Centre
dailyNews.description: Senior Congress leaders criticized the Centre for mismanaging LPG and fuel supply in Karnataka, causing transport disruptions and a livelihood crisis.

dailyNews.title: ‘Time will answer’: Congress leaders downplay buzz on power shuffle in Karnataka
dailyNews.description: Deputy CM DK Shivakumar sidesteps leadership change speculation as Congress campaigns for by-elections, asserting decisions rest with CM and party leadership.

dailyNews.title: Belonging to backward community is no ground for favour in government employment: Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: The court emphasised that recruitment processes, especially those involving large-scale public employment, must adhere strictly to notified conditions.

dailyNews.title: Iran War Timeline: Key moments, strikes and warnings before the ceasefire announced by Donald Trump
dailyNews.description: The war in West Asia trigerred with the US and Israel launching strikes across Iran, hitting a government compound in Tehran and military targets. Iran’s supreme leader, Ayatollah Khamenei, and other high-level military and intelligence leaders were killed.

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire ‘does not include Lebanon’
dailyNews.description: Israeli prime minister welcomes US decision to suspend attacks on Iran, but says the truce does not apply to Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Backward status no ground for favour in govt employment: SC
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court ruled that belonging to a backward community cannot guarantee employment, emphasizing fairness in public recruitment processes.

dailyNews.title: What we know about the two-week US and Iran ceasefire
dailyNews.description: The provisional truce comes more than a month after the US and Israel launched coordinated attacks on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Democrats call for Trump's impeachment over 'unhinged' Iran threats - even some Republicans are alarmed
dailyNews.description: Democratic lawmakers have responded to President Donald Trump's threats to obliterate Iran's ‘whole civilisation’ with an extraordinary chorus of demands for his removal

dailyNews.title: Oil Price Today (April 8): Crude oil price crashes 15% as Trump agrees 2-week ceasefire with Iran. What are experts saying?
dailyNews.description: Brent Crude oil price: Oil prices plummeted below $100 a barrel following President Trump's announcement of a two-week ceasefire with Iran, contingent on the safe reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. This development, averting a potential escalation, saw Brent crude fall to $94.43 and WTI to $96.82.

dailyNews.title: Bombings, threats, and last-minute phone calls: How events unfolded hours before Trump's 2-week Iran war ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Just before Trump’s Tuesday deadline, the United States and Israel struck key infrastructure in Iran with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu saying attacks hit railways and bridges allegedly used by the Revolutionary Guards.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration reaffirms plans to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
dailyNews.description: Abrego Garcia's wrongful removal in 2025 has spurred criticism of the Trump administration's mass deportation campaign.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo calls out Trump’s Iran rhetoric before last-minute ceasefire emerges
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo called President Trump's threat against Iran 'truly unacceptable,' urging world leaders to return to the negotiating table and reject war always.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed Republican pads GOP's fragile House majority by winning showdown for MTG's former seat
dailyNews.description: Republican Clay Fuller wins Georgia's 14th Congressional District special election, reinforcing the GOP's slim 218-214 House majority for Speaker Johnson.

dailyNews.title: Biden wanted to drive reliable energy 'into a ditch,' says Trump Energy Secretary
dailyNews.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright claimed Tuesday that the Biden administration was driving the U.S. energy system "into a ditch" through massive subsidies.

dailyNews.title: Trump agrees to 2-week ceasefire if Iran opens Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announces a two-week delay of a planned Iran strike following talks with Pakistani leaders and progress toward a potential agreement with Iran.

dailyNews.title: With Threat to Wipe Out Iran’s Civilization, Trump’s Rhetoric Goes Beyond Bluster
dailyNews.description: The president’s violent rhetoric risks damaging his credibility as a negotiator and the country’s standing in the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump Backs Down, but Questions Remain Over Iran and the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s short-term intimidation may have worked, but the fundamental divides with Iran are as sharp as they were in February.

dailyNews.title: Hours Before News of Cease-Fire, Pope Leo XIV Issues Strong Rebuke of Trump
dailyNews.description: The first U.S.-born pontiff has consistently called for dialogue to resolve the war in the Middle East. He referred to Trump’s Iran threats as ‘truly unacceptable.’

dailyNews.title: To Boost Military Budget, Trump Targets Popular Programs at Home
dailyNews.description: Amid the war with Iran, the president has proposed to scale back some of the very programs meant to ease families’ financial burdens.

dailyNews.title: Only Trump Knows Why Bondi Was Fired as Attorney General, Blanche Says
dailyNews.description: In his first news conference since being elevated to acting attorney general, Todd Blanche said that “nobody has any idea” what led to Pam Bondi’s dismissal other than President Trump.

dailyNews.title: DOJ’s Civil Rights Division Investigates Cassidy Hutchinson, Who Testified Against Trump
dailyNews.description: It was a highly unusual move by Justice Department leadership to direct a case that appears to involve accusations of lying to Congress to a division that normally focuses on civil rights abuses.
